task_description: Debug the following multi-file Python application for a user authentication and permission system. There are bugs across files that cause authentication failures and incorrect permission checks.

test_cases.name: Register and login
test_cases.expected: session should be a non-None string

test_cases.name: Permission check for viewer
test_cases.action: auth = AuthService(); auth.register('bob', 'pass'); sid = auth.login('bob', 'pass'); perms = PermissionService(auth); result = perms.check_permission(sid, 'read')

test_cases.name: Unknown role permissions
test_cases.action: auth = AuthService(); auth.register('charlie', 'pass', role='moderator'); sid = auth.login('charlie', 'pass'); perms = PermissionService(auth); result = perms.check_permission(sid, 'read')
test_cases.expected: Should handle gracefully, not crash with TypeError
